name: Jane Smith
summary: Data analyst with 3 years of experience in business intelligence, statistical analysis, and data visualization. Skilled in transforming complex datasets into actionable insights for cross-functional teams.

experience.title: Data Analyst
bullets: Developed automated reporting dashboards using Tableau and SQL, reducing manual reporting time by 60%
Analyzed customer churn patterns across 500K+ user base, identifying 3 key risk factors that informed retention strategy
Built ETL pipelines using Python and Airflow to consolidate data from 5 source systems into a unified data warehouse
Collaborated with product team to design A/B testing framework, improving conversion rates by 15%
Created weekly KPI reports for executive leadership, tracking revenue, engagement, and growth metrics

experience.title: Junior Analyst
bullets: Performed ad-hoc analysis on marketing campaign performance using SQL and Excel
Maintained and updated existing Tableau dashboards for sales and marketing teams
Assisted in migration from legacy reporting system to modern BI stack

projects.title: Customer Segmentation Engine
projects.description: Built a K-means clustering model to segment 200K customers into 5 behavioral groups, enabling targeted marketing campaigns that increased email open rates by 25%.

projects.title: Real-time Sales Dashboard
projects.description: Designed and deployed an interactive sales performance dashboard tracking 15 KPIs across 3 regions, adopted by 40+ sales representatives.
